titleStmt.title: SII 25.78: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 78. (A.R. No. 78 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nīllakaṇṭhēśvara temple.

p.hi: Kumāra Kampaṇa, son of Bokkaṇa: Sādhāraṇa: 1370 A.D.

summary.p: The beginning of the lines are lost. The record may palaeographically be assigned to c. 14th Century. The details of date viz., Sādhāraṇa, Dhanus śu 8, Wednesday, Uttiraṭṭādi regularly correspond to 1370 A.D., December 25, f.d.t. 68. The Śaka year being 1292 expired.

It records a grant of lands along with income from various taxes (specified) in the village Umaiyāḷ-ēndal in Poṉṉūrp-paṟṟu to provide for the worship, repairs and perpetual lamp to the deity Kaṟaikaṇṭīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Viḍār in Poṉṉūrp-paṟṟu in Śiṅgapura-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟakkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, for the merit of king Bokkaṇṇauḍaiyar (i.e., Bukka I). The name of the donor is not mentioned in the record. Probably it may be a royal gift that is referred to in this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The beginning of the lines are lost. pokkaṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar kumāra kampaṇa Uṭaiyarkkuc cellāniṉṟa sādhāraṇa varṣam dhanussu nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa cOḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu ciṅkapuranāṭṭup poṉṉūrpaṟṟu viṭāril Uṭaiyār kaṟaikkaṇṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Uṭaiyār
Uṭaiyarukku naṉṟāka Iṉṉāyanāṟku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum tiruṉantāviḷakkukkum Ippaṟṟil Umaiyāḷ Ental tirunāmattukkāṇi yiṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ivvūr nāṟpāṟkellaikkum Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai puṟavaṭai Erivāy puṟavaṭai nattam taricu kaḷarStops here.
Digital edition of SII 25.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
